zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Archibald Edmonstone於1345年出生在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾登崔亞斯時，他的父親Henry de Edmundiston46歲，母親Mrs Henry Eanric de Edmundiston46歲。他於大約1380年與Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1415年在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特拉斯賀布藍享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Archibald Edmonstone于1345年出生在英国苏格兰斯林史爾登崔亞斯时，他的父亲Henry de Edmundiston46岁，母亲Mrs Henry Eanric de Edmundiston46岁。他于大约1380年与Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1415年在英国苏格兰斯林史爾斯特拉斯賀布藍享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Edmonstone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Archibald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

variants.name: Archibold
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Archibald Edmonstone was born in 1345, in Duntreath, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Henry de Edmundiston, was 46 and his mother, Mrs Henry Eanric de Edmundiston, was 46. He married Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland about 1380, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1415, in Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Archibald Edmonstone est né en 1345, à Duntreath, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry d’Edmundiston, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Mrs Henry Eanric d’Edmundiston, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland environ 1380, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1415, à Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Archibald Edmonstone 1345 in Duntreath, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Edmundiston 46 und seine Mutter Mrs Henry Eanric de Edmundiston 46. Er hat um 1380 in Schottland, United Kingdom Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1415 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Archibald Edmonstone è nato il nel 1345 nel Duntreath, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry de Edmundiston, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Henry Eanric de Edmundiston, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland circa 1380, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1415, nel Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Archibald Edmonstoneが1345年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアダントレアスで生まれた時，父Henry de Edmundistonは46歳，母Mrs Henry Eanric de Edmundistonは46歳であった。約1380年にイギリススコットランドでIsabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1415年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアストラスブランで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Archibald Edmonstone(이)가 1345년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 던트리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Edmundiston(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Henry Eanric de Edmundiston(은)는 46세였다. 그는 대략 1380년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1415년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스트래스블랜에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Archibald Edmonstone nasceu em 1345, em Duntreath, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry de Edmundiston, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Henry Eanric de Edmundiston, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland aproximadamente 1380, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1415, em Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Archibald Edmonstone родился в 1345 г. в местности дунтрит, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry de Edmundiston было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Henry Eanric de Edmundiston, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland около 1380 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1415 г. в местности стратблан, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Archibald Edmonstone nació en 1345, en Duntreath, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry de Edmundiston, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Mrs Henry Eanric de Edmundiston, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland aproximadamente 1380, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1415, en Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años.
